title: triodia wiseana
intro: Triodia wiseana, also known as the Blue Grass or Blue Spinifex, is a type of grass native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Triodia wiseana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating wounds. Triodia wiseana is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal uses.
